brand_profile.writing_instruction: One idea per sentence. Lead with the outcome, not the mechanism. No jargon. No superlatives. The reader skims — the first line must earn the second. Avoid: game-changer, seamless, powerful, revolutionize.

css_tokens.--_font-family-h1: "TASA Orbiter Display SemiBold", "TASA Orbiter Display SemiBold Placeholder", sans-serif
css_tokens.--_font-family-h2: "TASA Orbiter Display SemiBold", "TASA Orbiter Display SemiBold Placeholder", sans-serif

brand_identity.writing_instruction: One idea per sentence. Lead with the outcome, not the mechanism. No jargon. No superlatives. The reader skims — the first line must earn the second. Avoid: game-changer, seamless, powerful, revolutionize.

product_knowledge.tagline: The infrastructure behind India's next hundred million businesses.
product_knowledge.description: Razorpay is an all-in-one finance platform that provides businesses with a suite of products to accept, process, and disburse payments. It offers a range of payment solutions, including online and offline payment gateways, international payments, and automated payroll and compliance tools. RazorpayX, the company's business banking arm, provides current accounts, payouts, and credit lines to help businesses manage their finances more efficiently.

features.name: Payment Gateway
features.description: A payment gateway that allows businesses to accept payments online

features.name: RazorpayX Payroll
features.description: An automated payroll and compliance solution for businesses

benefits: Improved conversion rates and reduced fraud

proof_points.text: No proof points found on source page or user document

messaging_angles: Simplifying payments and financial management for businesses
product_knowledge.target_customer: Businesses in India, particularly e-commerce, education, and SaaS providers

platform_rules_summary: Hook must be standalone in first 180 characters
3-5 hashtags at end only, never inline
Short paragraphs with blank line between each
content_brief.benchmark_reference: Fintech SaaS companies often use carousels to educate businesses about their solutions, highlighting pain points and features.
content_brief.reasoning: Chosen carousel for Razorpay's LinkedIn content because the product addresses 3 distinct pain points (Manual payment processing, Inefficient financial management, Difficulty with cross-border payments) and offers a solution through 2 key features. The minimal brand tone and educational aspect of showcasing 'Simplifying payments and financial management for businesses' align well with the carousel format. Although there is 1 proof point and a strong stat, the pain points and features drive the choice. Since short_video isn't supported and doesn't apply here, carousel is the best alternative.

strategy_brief.lead_pain_point: Manual payment processing slows down business growth and increases administrative burden
strategy_brief.primary_claim: Razorpay helps businesses accept, process, and disburse payments efficiently
strategy_brief.proof_point: No verified proof points available for this product
strategy_brief.hook_direction: Highlight the pain of manual payment processing
strategy_brief.messaging_angle_used: Simplifying payments and financial management for businesses

linkedin_content.hook: Manual payment processing slows down business growth.
linkedin_content.body:
Manual payment processing slows down business growth and increases administrative burden.

This slows down business growth.

It also leads to errors and delays in payment processing.

As a result, businesses struggle to manage their finances effectively.

Razorpay helps businesses accept, process, and disburse payments efficiently.

Learn more about how Razorpay can help your business.

Manual payment processing slows down business growth.

Manual payment processing slows down business growth and increases administrative burden.

This slows down business growth.

#paymentprocessing #businessgrowth #financialmanagement

evaluation.scores_rationale: The copy is clear overall, but some sentences feel a bit repetitive or simplistic, which slightly slows down reading. For example, the first and second sentences convey a similar idea. The hook 'Manual payment processing slows down business growth' establishes context but does not create urgency or curiosity. It does not specify what the reader will miss out on or what specific friction they experience. The copy largely follows the writing instruction, focusing on outcomes and avoiding jargon. However, it could improve by varying sentence structures and adding more specificity. Every claim directly relates to the primary claim. The copy accurately reflects how Razorpay helps businesses with payment processing.
